summary: Completed iteration 20 testing for Proposal System feature. All 11 backend tests pass. Full e2e frontend testing completed: client can create care requests, provider (when subscribed) can send proposals with price/message, client can view proposals and accept/reject them. When a proposal is accepted, the care request is marked as completed.
passed_tests: POST /api/care-requests - Client can create care request successfully
GET /api/care-requests/my-requests - Client can view their care requests
GET /api/care-requests - Provider can see care requests (limited info when not subscribed)
POST /api/proposals - Free provider correctly blocked (403) with subscription required message
POST /api/proposals - Client (non-provider) correctly blocked (403)
GET /api/proposals/my-sent - Provider can view sent proposals
GET /api/proposals/received - Client can view received proposals
GET /api/proposals/for-request/{request_id} - Client can view proposals for specific care request
PUT /api/proposals/{id}/respond - Invalid status correctly rejected (400)
PUT /api/proposals/{id}/respond - Non-existent proposal returns 404
Frontend: Client dashboard shows 'Solicitudes de Cuidado' section
Frontend: Client can create new care request with pet/service/comuna/description
Frontend: Success toast shows after care request creation
Frontend: Free provider sees 'Suscribete para enviar propuestas' warning
Frontend: Subscribed provider sees 'Cuenta Premium Activa' card
Frontend: Subscribed provider sees 'Enviar Propuesta' buttons next to care requests
Frontend: Proposal form appears with price and message fields (data-testid working)
Frontend: 'Propuesta enviada exitosamente' toast after submission
Frontend: 'Propuesta enviada ($15.000)' indicator shows after sending
Frontend: Client sees '1 propuesta recibida' with badge indicator
Frontend: Proposal card shows provider info, price ($15.000), message, rating
Frontend: 'Aceptar' and 'Rechazar' buttons visible for pending proposals
Frontend: 'Propuesta aceptada!' toast after accepting
Frontend: Care request status changes from 'Activa' to 'Completada' after acceptance
Frontend: 'Contactar Cuidador' button appears after acceptance

success_rate.backend: 100% (11/11 passed, 1 skipped - admin endpoint not available)

seed_data_creation: Activated provider subscription to 'active' status using /app/scripts/activate_provider_sub.py for full e2e testing. Created test care requests during frontend testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified the complete Proposal System feature. Key findings: 1) Free providers see care requests but cannot send proposals (correct 403 block). 2) Subscribed providers see 'Enviar Propuesta' buttons and can submit proposals with price/message. 3) Clients see proposal indicators, can expand to view details, and accept/reject. 4) Accepting a proposal marks the care request as 'completed'. 5) Provider subscription was manually activated using scripts/activate_provider_sub.py since the subscription flow requires MercadoPago payment. The provider cuidador@test.com now has an active subscription until April 4, 2026.

features_verified.view_care_requests: ✓ GET /api/care-requests works for providers (limited/full based on subscription)
features_verified.create_proposal: ✓ Subscribed provider can create proposal with price/message
features_verified.care_request_completion: ✓ Care request status changes to 'completed' when proposal accepted
features_verified.frontend_client_dashboard: ✓ Shows care requests with proposal indicators
features_verified.frontend_provider_dashboard: ✓ Shows care requests with 'Enviar Propuesta' for subscribed
features_verified.frontend_proposal_card: ✓ Shows provider info, price, message, accept/reject buttons
